text.title: agents Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agents as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running mode:plan without engineering review, then treating its output as a sprint backlog.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: mode:plan produces an implementation sequence but does not validate technical feasibility. It does not account for team capacity, technical debt, or infrastructure constraints.

failure-mode.description: Applying MLP dimensions as a rigid checklist to every product.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Not every dimension applies to every product. For some products, Speed is irrelevant; for others, Personality is counterproductive. Use dimensions as a structured brainstorm framework, not a mandatory checklist.

failure-mode.description: Using faion-mvp-scope-analyzer-agent output without validating against current competitor research.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The agent's training data may be outdated. In fast-moving markets (AI tooling, fintech), competitor feature sets change in months.
